instruction: A portfolio site handoff is waiting in ~/Desktop/portfolio_site/. Read HANDOFF.json to get the new owner profile and the reference docs URL. Then use VS Code to update _config.yml so it matches the handoff data and repair build_contact.py so the provided tests pass. Open the docsUrl from the handoff in Chrome while you work. When all changes are complete, create MIGRATION_DONE.txt in the project folder containing exactly `portfolio migrated`.
source: 现实场景构造来源：作品集站点换人维护时常见的“按 handoff 更新 YAML、修联系人生成脚本、打开托管文档并写迁移标记”站点迁移流程

parameters.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
base = Path('/home/user/Desktop/portfolio_site')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
json.dump({'name': 'Ava Lin', 'email': 'ava.lin@example.com', 'github': 'avalin-dev', 'docsUrl': 'https://docs.github.com/en/pages'}, open(base / 'HANDOFF.json', 'w'), indent=2)
(base / '_config.yml').write_text("""name: Old Portfolio
author:
  name: Old Portfolio
  email: old@portfolio.dev
github_username: old-portfolio
""")
(base / 'build_contact.py').write_text("""def build_contact(name, email, github):
    return f'{name} <{github}> {email}'
""")
(base / 'test.py').write_text("""from build_contact import build_contact

def test():
    assert build_contact('Ava Lin', 'ava.lin@example.com', 'avalin-dev') == 'Ava Lin <ava.lin@example.com> @avalin-dev'
""")
PY
